hooks.command: diff -q "${extensionPath}/package.json" "${HOME}/.cache/devostat/package.json" >/dev/null 2>&1 || (mkdir -p "${HOME}/.cache/devostat" && cp "${extensionPath}/package.json" "${HOME}/.cache/devostat/" && npm install --prefix "${HOME}/.cache/devostat" --silent && mkdir -p "${HOME}/.cache/devostat/dist" && cp "${extensionPath}"/dist/*.js "${HOME}/.cache/devostat/dist/" && echo "devostat: deps installed") || rm -f "${HOME}/.cache/devostat/package.json"
